creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 194990
patch to update the port

- update 1.30 -> 1.33
- add LICENSE_FILE
- Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/SQL-Abstract-More
- adopt mainainership of this port, 
	which has been abandoned by Espen Tagestad <espen@tagestad.no> 
	since 2013:
		https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/databases/p5-SQL-Abstract-More/Makefile?view=log
	about maintainership of this port, see also:
		https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=223352

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180601 runs ok at 11.2-release-amd64
	with pkg 1.10.99.7, perl 5.26.2
- buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
